title: Ender Dragon Prime
description: Non over-the-top, Highly configurable Datapack that makes Ender Dragon more difficult and unique
body:
![Ender Dragon Prime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4b1859833bb1298595e7bbf6c6f9d6908c4d25b.png)
Does the ender dragon become too easy in multiplayer? Is it too easy for even one person? This datapack overhauls the basic dragon fight, and allows almost total configurability when it comes to difficulty and customization. I added my own touch while trying to maintain a somewhat vanilla feel.

### **Which Version to Get**

If you have a good pc and are in a single player world, I would recommend the particle intense version, but on servers or laggy pcs I would advise the particle budget version

### **Adjusting Settings**
- The default settings are what I recomend for single player
- To change the settings use the command "/function harderdrag:configure"
  - Click on the options in chat to change the settings
- To return to default settings use the command "/function harderdrag:defaultsettings"
- For an unfair preset use the command "/function harderdrag:impossiblesettings"

### **Minor Changes**
- Attacking Ender dragon enough will agro enderman on the player (Able to be toggled)
- When the ender dragon is alive more enderman spawn on the main island
- The dragon perches regularly
- Enderdragon gives buffs to enderman while alive (Adjustable and toggleable)
- Enderman will no longer agro on the dragon
- Dragons breath from a perched dragon releases a wave that must be jumped over

### **Dragon Ablilities**
  Dragon fireball has been completely overhauled
  - Dragon fires them more regularly
  - Fireball homes on a players location at the time it was fired
  - When it lands it sends out a deadly wave that must be jumped over to avoid damage
  - Accuracy of the fireball is adjustable
  - Speed of the fireball is adjustable
  - Sound of the fireball is adjustable

  The dragon now has an anger level
  - Increases by 1% every 3 seconds
  - Increases by 3% when the dragon is hit
  - When the dragon reaches 100% anger, it lets out a large explosion.
    - In order to take no damage you must be behind obsidian cover
    - Dragon does a configurable amount of self-damage on explosion
  - Watch the Anger Level if you plan on living

  Dragon Essence
  - Disabled by Default
  - Designed for a challenge in multiplayer
  - The dragon can leave it's essence around the island
  - While the essence is around the dragon is invincible
  - Destroying the essence will hurt the dragon, and increase it's anger by 3
  - Cooldown is adjustable
  - Max essence at a time is adjustable

### **Additional Modifiable Settings**
- Dragon Max HP
- Toggle if fireballs can travel through obsidian
- Adjustable Dragon Speed
- If dragon has a slow natural regeneration


<details>
<summary>Tips and Advice *Minor Spoils* </summary>

The dragon explosion is survivable if you take cover behind obsidian

If you aren't behind cover you will get one-shot unless you do one of the following:

- You have a totem of undying
- You use a God Apple
- You use a Potion of Turtlemaster

Dragon Essence can't be destroyed by arrows, however if you want to destroy them from a distance you can use snowballs or maybe even eggs

It takes 3 hits on the dragon for enderman to agro on you


</details>



Sorry for anyone trying to modify this datapack, it started as a personal project for my own server, hence it is very unorganized

If you find any issues or bugs please email me at cray.25@outlook.com
